@Bobwise Also if someone texts me I won’t open it and read it until I am ready to give it my full attention and respond, I used to get messages in the moment and read them and then forget, now I keep them unread until I am ready
Squeaking swings and tall grass, the longest shadows ever cast.

@Bobwise I keep my read receipts on so that I am pressured to respond as soon as I get it, before read receipts I would take forever to respond, but now there is a sort of built in ticking clock, some social accountability
